visual_description: A woman with long dark curly hair wearing a sleeveless leopard‑print dress with red heart motifs stands beside a man reclining on a white couch; the man wears glasses, an orange polo shirt, dark trousers and holds a cigar in his right hand while exhaling smoke. She leans forward, places her left hand on his chest and rests her head near his face, appearing to whisper or speak to him.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with faint ambient noise and indistinct speech, making the sounds unclear.
